description_long: This is an adult woman with a slender build, standing upright with arms slightly extended to the sides. She is wearing a sleeveless, form-fitting dress with a deep neckline and a short hemline, paired with high-heeled strappy sandals. Her hair is styled in a neat bun at the back of her head, exposing her facial features and neck. The dress is visually divided into two sections, with the upper part and lower skirt in contrasting colors. The figure's posture is neutral and balanced, suitable for walking or standing in urban environments. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the overall appearance is clean and modern.
description: An adult woman in a sleeveless, short dress and high-heeled sandals, standing upright with her hair in a bun. The look is modern and suitable for urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view shows the deep neckline of the sleeveless dress, facial features, and strappy sandals.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the dress, the bun hairstyle, and the high-heeled sandals.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the dress, the bun hairstyle, and the open back design.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of the dress and footwear.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless short dress with a deep neckline and fitted silhouette
